initiatives.name: Smart cooling control (electrode temperature)
initiatives.description: Reduced blower runtime by 4.28 hours/day by modifying control logic.
initiatives.outcome: Saved 1.66 lakh units of electricity annually (INR 10.8 lakhs).

initiatives.name: Optimum use of chemicals/water/energy at CPP-DM plant
initiatives.description: Replaced faulty ejectors, rotameters, valves; optimized downflow rates and degasser levels.
initiatives.outcome: 12% reduction in HCl, 15% in NaOH; raw water reduced by 420 m3/year.

initiatives.name: Boiler waste water reuse
initiatives.description: Settling tank and pipeline extension to reuse DM water from boiler hydro-tests.

enrichment.managementCommentary: JSL remains steadfast in its commitment to building a greener and more sustainable future. Embracing scrap-based production through electric arc furnaces — one of the most environmentally friendly methods. Promoting waste-to-value creation and a closed-loop recycling system.

awardsAndRatings.name: LEED v4.1 O+M
awardsAndRatings.score: Platinum (Stainless Centre Gurgaon), Gold (JSL Jajpur clubhouse)

forwardLooking.description: Assess 100% of suppliers on ESG criteria

qualitativePolicies.P1_ethics: Implements Anti-Bribery and Anti-Corruption Policy and Supplier Code of Conduct evaluating partners across all 9 BRSR principles.
qualitativePolicies.P3_ohs: Occupational Health and Safety Policy under ISO 45001:2018. Achieved LTIFR of 0 for employees and contractors in FY2025.
qualitativePolicies.P6_environment: Climate Change, Water Management, and Biodiversity policies. Implements ZLD and sources 72.11% recycled scrap.

steelProduction.note: From plan config (2.43 MnT stainless steel).

enrichment.waterIntensityNote: FY2025 PDF confirms 358.67 kL/Rs.Crore. XBRL filer switched denominator to per-rupee (0.0000359 = 358.67/10M). Patched to 358.67 kL/Crore for consistency with FY2023/FY2024.
enrichment.ltiFRNote: LTIFR = 0 for employees and contractors in FY2025. Flagged for AI analysis: plausible for EAF-based stainless with strong safety culture but should be noted.
